data.name: SubFileImporter_File_not_found
data.value: No sub file was imported: the selected sub file does not exist

data.name: SubFileImporter_Name_Substance_and_Process_Library
data.value: Substance and Process Library

data.name: SubFileImporter_Path_not_set
data.value: No sub file was imported: no file selection was made

data.name: SubFileImporter_Substance_process_library_not_set
data.value: Substance process library is not set

data.name: SubstanceProcessLibrary_OutputParameters_Rad
data.value: Rad

data.name: SubstanceProcessLibrary_OutputParameters_Rad_description
data.value: Solar radiation (W/m2)

data.name: SubstanceProcessLibrary_OutputParameters_Surf
data.value: Surf

data.name: SubstanceProcessLibrary_OutputParameters_Surf_description
data.value: Horizontal surface area of a DELWAQ segment (m2)

data.name: SubstanceProcessLibrary_OutputParameters_Temp
data.value: Temp

data.name: SubstanceProcessLibrary_OutputParameters_Temp_description
data.value: Water temperature (oC)

data.name: SubstanceProcessLibrary_OutputParameters_Volume
data.value: Volume

data.name: SubstanceProcessLibrary_OutputParameters_Volume_description
data.value: Volume of computational cell (m3)

data.name: TemplateInpFile
data.value:
512 80 ';' ;DELWAQ_VERSION_4.910 ; Delwaq version number ;PRINT_OUTPUT_OPTION_9 ; Debug level
; TEMPLATE FILE FOR WATER QUALITY CALCULATION ; First input block 'Water quality calculation' ' ' ' ' INCLUDE 'includes_deltashell/B1_t0.inc' ; From UI: Time stamp INCLUDE 'includes_deltashell/B1_sublist.inc' ; From UI: Substance list #1;
;############################################################################### ; Second input block INCLUDE 'includes_deltashell/B2_sysclock.inc' ; From UI: System clock INCLUDE 'includes_deltashell/B2_numsettings.inc' ; From UI: Simulation timers INCLUDE 'includes_deltashell/B2_simtimers.inc' ; From UI: Simulation timers 1 ; Monitoring areas in this file INCLUDE 'includes_deltashell/B2_outlocs.inc' ; From UI: Definition of output locations 2 ; No monitoring cross areas INCLUDE 'includes_deltashell/B2_outputtimers.inc' ; From UI: Simulation timers
#2; ;############################################################################### ; Third input block INCLUDE 'includes_deltashell/B3_ugrid.inc' ; Reference to the waqgeom file for UGRID NetCDF output INCLUDE '{0}B3_nrofseg.inc' ; From UI: Nr of segments 2 ; Structure matrix not used 0 ; Features of the computational elements 0
; Volumes from binary files -2 ; No online Flow-WAQ, interpolate Volume '{0}volume.dat' #3; ;############################################################################### ; Fourth input block INCLUDE '{0}B4_nrofexch.inc' ; From UI: Nr of exchanges 1 ; Number of dispersion arrays INCLUDE 'includes_deltashell/B4_dispersion.inc' ; From UI: Dispersion to all substances 0 ; Number of velocity arrays 1 ; Input format of the pointers
-1 ; Pointers from Auxilary file '{0}B4_pointer.inc' ; From UI: Pointers
; START TODO 1 ; Dispersions in this file 1.0 1.0 1.0 ; Scale factors for 3 directions 0 0.0 0.0 ; Values (m2/s) for 3 directions ; END TODO
INCLUDE 'includes_deltashell/B4_dispx.inc' ; From UI: Dispersion(x)
-2 ; No online Flow-WAQ, interpolate Area '{0}area.dat'
; FLOWS from binary files -2 ; No online Flow-WAQ, interpolate FLOW '{0}flow.dat'
; Lenght from binary files 1 ; Vary in space 0 ; From binary file '{0}length.dat'
#4; ;############################################################################### ; Fifth input block, water quality calculation
; Boundary list INCLUDE 'includes_deltashell/B5_boundlist.inc' ; From UI: Boundary data
0 ; No Tatcher-Harleman time lags
; Boundary data (dummy value) INCLUDE 'includes_deltashell/B5_bounddata.inc' ; From UI: Boundary data
#5; ;############################################################################### ; Sixth input block, Dry Waste Loads block ; Number of loads (dummy value) 0 ; Number of loads
#6; ;############################################################################### ; Seventh input block
CONSTANTS 'CLOSE_ERR' DATA 1 CONSTANTS 'ONLY_ACTIVE' DATA 0 ; Only active processes CONSTANTS 'Nothreads' DATA 0 ; Multicore CONSTANTS 'Iteration report' DATA 0
INCLUDE 'includes_deltashell/B7_processes.inc' ; From UI: Processes INCLUDE 'includes_deltashell/B7_constants.inc' ; From UI: Constants INCLUDE 'includes_deltashell/B7_functions.inc' ; From UI: Functions INCLUDE 'includes_deltashell/B7_parameters.inc' ; From UI: Parameters
SEG_FUNCTIONS 'Chezy' ALL BINARY_FILE '{0}chezy.dat'
SEG_FUNCTIONS 'Surf' ALL BINARY_FILE '{0}surface.dat'
SEG_FUNCTIONS 'Velocity' ALL BINARY_FILE '{0}velocity.dat'
SEG_FUNCTIONS 'Width' ALL BINARY_FILE '{0}width.dat'
#7 ;############################################################################### ; Eighth input block
INCLUDE 'includes_deltashell/B8_initials.inc' ; From UI: Initials
#8 ;############################################################################### ; Ninth input block 1 ; Conditions follow in this file 1 ; Monitor-file 0 ; Grid-file INCLUDE 'includes_deltashell/B9_Hisvar.inc' ; History-file INCLUDE 'includes_deltashell/B9_Mapvar.inc' ; Map-file ; Binary/Nefis and History/Map 0 ; Switch on binary History file 0 ; Switch on binary Map file 1 ; Switch off Nefis History file 1 ; Switch off Nefis Map file #9 ;############################################################################### ; Tenth input block #10

data.name: TemplateInpFileHybrid
data.value:
512 80 ';' ;DELWAQ_VERSION_4.910 ; Delwaq version number ;PRINT_OUTPUT_OPTION_9 ; Debug level
; TEMPLATE FILE FOR WATER QUALITY CALCULATION ; First input block 'Water quality calculation' ' ' ' ' INCLUDE 'includes_deltashell/B1_t0.inc' ; From UI: Time stamp INCLUDE 'includes_deltashell/B1_sublist.inc' ; From UI: Substance list #1;
;############################################################################### ; Second input block INCLUDE 'includes_deltashell/B2_sysclock.inc' ; From UI: System clock INCLUDE 'includes_deltashell/B2_numsettings.inc' ; From UI: Simulation timers INCLUDE 'includes_deltashell/B2_simtimers.inc' ; From UI: Simulation timers 1 ; Monitoring areas in this file INCLUDE 'includes_deltashell/B2_outlocs.inc' ; From UI: Definition of output locations 2 ; No monitoring cross areas INCLUDE 'includes_deltashell/B2_outputtimers.inc' ; From UI: Simulation timers
#2; ;############################################################################### ; Third input block INCLUDE 'includes_deltashell/B3_ugrid.inc' ; Reference to the waqgeom file for UGRID NetCDF output INCLUDE '{0}B3_nrofseg.inc' ; From UI: Nr of segments 2 ; Structure matrix not used 0 ; Features of the computational elements 0
; Volumes (dummy values) 1 ; Volumes in this file 2 ; Constants with defaults 1.0 1.0E008 ; Scale factor and default value 0 ; Number of overrides ; Volumes added by Model API
#3; ;############################################################################### ; Fourth input block INCLUDE '{0}B4_nrofexch.inc' ; From UI: Nr of exchanges 1 ; Number of dispersion arrays INCLUDE 'includes_deltashell/B4_dispersion.inc' ; From UI: Dispersion to all substances 0 ; Number of velocity arrays 1 ; Input format of the pointers
-1 ; Pointers from Auxilary file '{0}B4_pointer.inc' ; From UI: Pointers
; START TODO 1 ; Dispersions in this file 1.0 1.0 1.0 ; Scale factors for 3 directions 0 0.0 0.0 ; Values (m2/s) for 3 directions ; END TODO
INCLUDE 'includes_deltashell/B4_dispx.inc' ; From UI: Dispersion(x)
; Areas (dummy values) 1 ; Areas in this file 2 ; Constants with defaults 1.0 1.0E004 ; Scale factor and default value 0 ; Number of overrides ; Areas added by Model API
; Flows (dummy values) 1 ; Flows in this file 2 ; Constants with defaults 1.0 0.2E004 ; Scale factor and default value 0 ; Number of overrides ; Flows added by Model API
; Lenght from binary files 1 ; Vary in space 0 ; From binary file '{0}length.dat'
#4; ;############################################################################### ; Fifth input block, water quality calculation
; Boundary list INCLUDE 'includes_deltashell/B5_boundlist.inc' ; From UI: Boundary data
0 ; No Tatcher-Harleman time lags
; Boundary data (dummy value) INCLUDE 'includes_deltashell/B5_bounddata.inc' ; From UI: Boundary data
#5; ;############################################################################### ; Sixth input block, Dry Waste Loads block ; Number of loads (dummy value) 0 ; Number of loads
#6; ;############################################################################### ; Seventh input block
CONSTANTS 'CLOSE_ERR' DATA 1 CONSTANTS 'ONLY_ACTIVE' DATA 0 ; Only active processes CONSTANTS 'Nothreads' DATA 0 ; Multicore CONSTANTS 'Iteration report' DATA 0
INCLUDE 'includes_deltashell/B7_processes.inc' ; From UI: Processes INCLUDE 'includes_deltashell/B7_constants.inc' ; From UI: Constants INCLUDE 'includes_deltashell/B7_functions.inc' ; From UI: Functions INCLUDE 'includes_deltashell/B7_parameters.inc' ; From UI: Parameters
; Segment functions (dummy values) INCLUDE 'includes_deltashell/B7_chezy.inc' ; Chezy INCLUDE 'includes_deltashell/B7_surf.inc' ; Surface INCLUDE 'includes_deltashell/B7_velocity.inc' ; Velocity INCLUDE 'includes_deltashell/B7_width.inc' ; Width ; Values added by Model API
#7 ;############################################################################### ; Eighth input block
INCLUDE 'includes_deltashell/B8_initials.inc' ; From UI: Initials
#8 ;############################################################################### ; Ninth input block 1 ; Conditions follow in this file 1 ; Monitor-file 0 ; Grid-file INCLUDE 'includes_deltashell/B9_Hisvar.inc' ; History-file INCLUDE 'includes_deltashell/B9_Mapvar.inc' ; Map-file ; Binary/Nefis and History/Map 0 ; Switch on binary History file 0 ; Switch on binary Map file 1 ; Switch off Nefis History file 1 ; Switch off Nefis Map file #9 ;############################################################################### ; Tenth input block #10

data.name: WaterQualityBoundaryData_Constant_post_fix
data.value: - Constant

data.name: WaterQualityBoundaryData_SetConstFunction_Constant
data.value: Constant

data.name: WaterQualityBoundaryData_SetConstFunction_Substance
data.value: Substance

data.name: WaterQualityBoundaryData_Time_series_post_fix
data.value: - Time series

data.name: WaterQualityModelValidate_CheckTimers_Linked_flow
data.value: linked flow

data.name: WaterQualityModelValidate_CheckTimers_Period_should_be_correctly_bounded
data.value: The {0} period of the model ({1} - {2}) should be bounded by the {3} period of the {4}model ({5} - {6})

data.name: WaterQualityModelValidate_CheckTimers_Start_time_cannot_be_after_stop_time
data.value: The {0} start time cannot be after the {0} stop time

data.name: WaterQualityModelValidate_CheckTimers_Start_time_must_be_aligned_with_sample
data.value: The {0} start time must be expressed as "{1} + N * {2}" (N must be an integer)

data.name: WaterQualityModelValidate_CheckTimers_Stop_time_must_be_aligned_with_sample
data.value: The {0} stop time must be expressed as "{1} + N * {2}" (N must be an integer)

data.name: WaterQualityModelValidate_CheckTimers_Time_step_cannot_be_greater_than_difference_start_and_stop_time
data.value: The {0} time step cannot be larger than the difference between the {0} start and stop time ({1})

data.name: WaterQualityModelValidate_CheckTimers_Time_step_must_be_greater_than_0
data.value: The {0} time step must be greater than 0

data.name: WaterQualityModelValidate_CheckTimers_Time_step_must_be_integer_positive_non_zero_multiple
data.value: The {0} time step must be an integer positive non-zero multiple {1}of the {2} time step ({3})

data.name: WaterQualityModelValidate_CheckTimers_Time_step_must_be_result_of_integer_division
data.value: or the result of an integer division

data.name: No_working_directory_specified
data.value: No working directory specified. Working directory set to '{0}'

data.name: Could_not_create_working_directory
data.value: Could not create working directory '{0}'. Working directory set to '{1}'

data.name: hydFile
data.value: ..\resources\hydfile.png;System.Drawing.Bitmap, System.Drawing, Version=4.0.0.0, Culture=neutral, PublicKeyToken=b03f5f7f11d50a3a

data.name: TemplateInpFileNew
data.value:
1000 80 ';' ;DELWAQ_VERSION_4.910 ; Delwaq version number ;PRINT_OUTPUT_OPTION_4 ; Debug level
; TEMPLATE FILE FOR WATER QUALITY CALCULATION ; First input block 'Water quality calculation' ' ' ' ' INCLUDE 'includes_deltashell/B1_t0.inc' ; From UI: Time stamp INCLUDE 'includes_deltashell/B1_sublist.inc' ; From UI: Substance list #1;
;############################################################################### ; Second input block 86400 'DDHHMMSS' 'DDHHMMSS' ; system clock INCLUDE 'includes_deltashell/B2_numsettings.inc' ; From UI: Simulation timers INCLUDE 'includes_deltashell/B2_simtimers.inc' ; From UI: Simulation timers 1 ; Monitoring areas in this file INCLUDE 'includes_deltashell/B2_outlocs.inc' ; From UI: Definition of output locations 2 ; No monitoring cross areas INCLUDE 'includes_deltashell/B2_outputtimers.inc' ; From UI: Simulation timers
#2; ;############################################################################### ; Third input block INCLUDE 'includes_deltashell/B3_ugrid.inc' ; Reference to the waqgeom file for UGRID NetCDF output INCLUDE 'includes_deltashell/B3_nrofseg.inc' ; From UI: Nr of segments (multiply number-water-quality-segments-per-layer and number-water-quality-layers from HYD) 2 ; Structure matrix not used
INCLUDE 'includes_deltashell/B3_attributes.inc' ; From UI: attributes file
INCLUDE 'includes_deltashell/B3_volumes.inc' ; From UI: volumes-file #3; ;############################################################################### ; Fourth input block INCLUDE 'includes_deltashell/B4_nrofexch.inc' ; From UI: Nr of exchanges (number-horizontal-exchanges followed by a zero and number-vertical-exchanges from HYD) 0 ; Number of dispersion arrays (this is different when spatial dispersion is implemented) 0 ; Number of velocity arrays 1 ; Input format of the pointers.
INCLUDE 'includes_deltashell/B4_pointers.inc' ; From UI: Pointers (pointers file from hyd file)
1 ; Dispersions in this file 1.0 1.0 1.0 ; Scale factors for 3 directions INCLUDE 'includes_deltashell/B4_cdispersion.inc' ; From UI: constant dispersion (horizontal zero vertical)
INCLUDE 'includes_deltashell/B4_area.inc' ; From UI: Area file from hyd file
INCLUDE 'includes_deltashell/B4_flows.inc' ; From UI: flows file from hyd-file
1 ; Vary in space INCLUDE 'includes_deltashell/B4_length.inc' ; From UI: length file from hyd-file
#4; ;############################################################################### ; Fifth input block, water quality calculation
; Boundary list INCLUDE 'includes_deltashell/B5_boundlist.inc' ; From UI: Boundary segments
0 ; No Tatcher-Harleman time lags
INCLUDE 'includes_deltashell/B5_boundaliases.inc' ; From UI: Boundary location aliases INCLUDE 'includes_deltashell/B5_bounddata.inc' ; From UI: Boundary data
#5; ;############################################################################### ; Sixth input block, Dry Waste Loads block INCLUDE 'includes_deltashell/B6_loads.inc' ; From UI: dry waste load definitions INCLUDE 'includes_deltashell/B6_loads_aliases.inc' ; From UI: dry waste load location aliases INCLUDE 'includes_deltashell/B6_loads_data.inc' ; From UI: dry waste load data
#6; ;############################################################################### ; Seventh input block
CONSTANTS 'ONLY_ACTIVE' DATA 0 ; Only active processes
INCLUDE 'includes_deltashell/B7_processes.inc' ; From UI: Processes INCLUDE 'includes_deltashell/B7_constants.inc' ; From UI: Constants INCLUDE 'includes_deltashell/B7_functions.inc' ; From UI: Functions INCLUDE 'includes_deltashell/B7_parameters.inc' ; From UI: Parameters INCLUDE 'includes_deltashell/B7_dispersion.inc' ; FROM UI: Spatial dispersion INCLUDE 'includes_deltashell/B7_vdiffusion.inc' ; FROM UI: Vertical diffusion
INCLUDE 'includes_deltashell/B7_segfunctions.inc' ; FROM UI: SEG_FUNCTION blocks INCLUDE 'includes_deltashell/B7_numerical_options.inc' ; FROM UI: numerical options
#7 ;############################################################################### ; Eighth input block
INCLUDE 'includes_deltashell/B8_initials.inc' ; From UI: Initials
#8 ;############################################################################### ; Ninth input block 1 ; Conditions follow in this file 1 ; Default monitor-file 0 ; No grid-file INCLUDE 'includes_deltashell/B9_Hisvar.inc' ; From UI: History-file INCLUDE 'includes_deltashell/B9_Mapvar.inc' ; From UI: Map-file ; Binary/Nefis and History/Map 0 ; Switch on binary History file 0 ; Switch on binary Map file 1 ; Switch off Nefis History file 1 ; Switch off Nefis Map file #9 ;############################################################################### ; Tenth input block #10

data.name: weight
data.value: ..\resources\weight.png;System.Drawing.Bitmap, System.Drawing, Version=4.0.0.0, Culture=neutral, PublicKeyToken=b03f5f7f11d50a3a

data.name: Observation
data.value: ..\Resources\observation.png;System.Drawing.Bitmap, System.Drawing, Version=4.0.0.0, Culture=neutral, PublicKeyToken=b03f5f7f11d50a3a

data.name: DataTableCsvFileReader_CreateDataTableCsvContents_Line__0__contains_wrong_substance_value___1_
data.value: Line {0} contains wrong substance value: {1}

data.name: WaterQualityModelValidator_CheckTimers_Timers_for__0__are_not_equal_to_the_simulation_period_of_the_model___1____2____Please_verify_that_they_overlap_with_the_simulation_period_
data.value: Timers for {0} are not equal to the simulation period of the model ({1}, {2}). Please verify that they overlap with the simulation period.

data.name: WaterQualityModel_LogSynchronizedTimer_Output_timers___0___have_been_synchronized_to_match_the_Simulation__0____1___
data.value: Output timers ({0}) have been synchronized to match the Simulation {0} ({1}).

data.name: SubFileImporter_Import_Sub_file_successfully_imported_from___0_
data.value: Sub file successfully imported from: {0}

data.name: WaterQualityModel_ImportHydroData_The_coordinate_system_of_the_model___0__has_been_set_to__1_
data.value: The coordinate system of the model: {0} has been set to {1}

data.name: WaterQualityModel_HandleNewHydroDynamicsFunctionDataSet_The_process_coefficient__0__has_been_updated_with_the_latest_Hydrodynamic_data_file_
data.value: The process coefficient {0} has been updated with the latest Hydrodynamic data file.

data.name: WaqValidationRulesExtension_ConstantProcessWithinRuleLimits_No_rules_found_for__0__
data.value: No rules found for {0}.

data.name: WaterQualityModelValidator_ValidateProcessCoefficients_The_Substance_library_does_not_contain_the_given_parameter__0__
data.value: The Substance library does not contain the given parameter {0}.

data.name: WaterQualityModelValidator_ValidateProcessCoefficients_No_process_coefficient_rules_have_been_loaded__Therefore_they_cannot_be_validated_
data.value: No process coefficient rules have been loaded. Therefore they cannot be validated.

data.name: DataTableManager_WriteTableContentsToNewTextDocumentFromFile_File___0___already_exists_within_the_database__The_file_that_is_being_imported_will_be_renamed_to___1____Note_that_your_results_may_be_affected_by_the_new_import
data.value: File '{0}' already exists within the database. The file that is being imported will be renamed to '{1}'. Note that your results may be affected by the new import

data.name: WaqProcessesRules_ReadValidationCsv_File__0__not_found_in_the_path__1___No_validations_will_be_done_for_the_coefficients_
data.value: File {0} not found in the path {1}. No validations will be done for the coefficients.

data.name: WaqValidationRulesExtension_GetWaqProcessValidationRuleAsString_Process_coefficient__0___value__1____2__3__
data.value: Process coefficient {0} (value:{1}) {2}{3}.

data.name: LazyMapFileFunctionStore_GetArgumentValues_Filters_of_type___0___can_only_filter_on_functions_with_value_type___1___
data.value: Filters of type <{0}> can only filter on functions with value type <{1}>.

data.name: WaqFileBasedProcessor_AddOutput_work_directory_is_empty
data.value: Could not add output because work directory is empty.

data.name: WaqFileBasedProcessor_AddOutput_Could_not_read_output_files
data.value: Could not read output files : {0}

data.name: WaqProcessorHelper_ParseHisFileData_Invalid_file_format
data.value: File is not recognized as a valid format for history files: {0}

data.name: WaqProcessorHelper_ParseHisFileData_An_error_occurred_while_reading_file
data.value: An error occurred while reading file {0}: check the textual output files for more information.

data.name: NetCdfFileReaderHelper_GetDateTimes_Time_variable_not_found
data.value: Time series data could not be read because variable with standard name '{0}' was not found in file {1}.

data.name: DelwaqNetCdfHistoryFileReader_Read_History_file_not_found
data.value: History file was not found at {0}.

data.name: DelwaqNetCdfMapFileReader_Map_file_not_found
data.value: Map file was not found at {0}.

data.name: WaterQualityModel_File_does_not_meet_supported_UGRID_1_0_or_newer_standard
data.value: File <{0}> does not meet supported UGRID 1.0 or newer standard.

data.name: WaqInitializationDataVerifier_GridFile does_not_meet_supported_UGRID_1_0
data.value: File <{0}> does not meet supported UGRID 1.0 or newer standard. Your NetCDF output file may not be properly viewed in the User Interface.

data.name: WaqInitializationDataVerifier_Grid_file_was_not_found
data.value: Grid file was not found at {0}.

data.name: WaterQualityModelValidator_hyd_file_doesnt_exist
data.value: The hyd file with location {0} doesn't exist.

data.name: SubFileImporter_DefaultOutputParameters_Name
data.value: default output parameters

data.name: SubFileImporter_OutputParameters_Name
data.value: output parameters

data.name: SubFileImporter_Substances_Name
data.value: substances

data.name: SubFileImporter_Parameters_Name
data.value: parameters

data.name: SubFileImporter_Processes_Name
data.value: processes

data.name: WaqHistoryFileParser_SetDataOnObservationVariableOutput_Time_steps_are_inconsistent_for_the_data_related_to_variable__0__
data.value: Time steps are inconsistent for the data related to variable {0}.
